user_id.description: Reference to the buyer contact in the Users table

name.description: Full name of the buyer contact

email.description: Business email address of the buyer contact

country.description: Country or market where the buyer is based

phone.description: Phone or messaging contact for follow-up

product_category.description: Product category the buyer wants to source

product_description.description: Short description of the product, specifications, or sourcing requirement

order_quantity.description: Expected order quantity or target MOQ

target_price.description: Target price or budget information provided by the buyer

services_needed.description: Sourcing services requested by the buyer

timeline.description: Target sourcing, sampling, production, or shipping timeline

shipping_destination.description: Destination country, port, warehouse, or delivery market

status.description: Internal review status for the sourcing inquiry

created_at.description: Timestamp when the inquiry was submitted
